name: Thanksgiving
traditions: Turkey dinner with stuffing and cranberry sauce; pumpkin pie; Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade; football games; family gatherings.
historicalBackground: Thanksgiving commemorates the 1621 harvest feast shared by Plymouth colonists and Wampanoag people. It became a national holiday in 1863 under Abraham Lincoln.
description: America's beloved harvest celebration, bringing families together for turkey dinners, parades, and gratitude on the fourth Thursday of November.
